raw_text:
verdict=ESCALATE  
reason=Blue Quay Markets has an active high-risk relationship and the requested advisory fee transaction is outside the provided onboarding approval context; execution policy requires active relationship, transaction-type approval, amount limit, and account token, but the packet only shows an onboarding approval (`TXA-1610`) with no clear approval/limit for this fee transaction, so it should be escalated before execution (`B16-10-SRC-02`, `B16-10-SRC-03`, `B16-10-SRC-05`).
